question: What are the biggest mistakes people make when building a wardrobe?
answer_preview: 1. The Fantasy Self Trap — buying for a version of you that doesn't exist. 2. Fear of the Tailor — off-the-rack fits nobody perfectly. 3. Fabric Ignorance — polyester is a crime against skin. 4. Over-curation to Blandness — safe is forgettable. 5. Shoe Neglect — your foundation defines your silhouette.
